calendar.matters:
Petition For Order 1 Modifying Trust For Changed Circumstances And 2 Appointing Successor Trustee The Jane Olds Zanze Trust Created Under The Will Of William Lee Olds
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Rothstein for Jane Bogart (Petitioner).

The Court noted that it saw the response to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Rothstein stated that historically he has not had to provide the address of the petitioner. The Court informed Mr. Rothstein that this should be under another trust case number and that any future filings are to be done in a new trust case. The Court granted the Petition for Order Modifying Trust, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Modification Of Trust Granting Individual Co-Trustees Exclusive Powers To Direct Investment Of Trust Funds, To Delegate Investment Functions To Investment Advisor'S Performance Of The Delegated Investment Functions
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootsky for Wells Fargo Bank (Petitioner/Co-Trustee).

Mr. Skootksy stated that the Co-Trustees, the Ivestment Advisor (outside of Wells Fargo) and Wells Fargo were content with the existing investment strategy, and that it relieves a point of tension. The Petition for Modification of Trust Granting Individual Co-Trustees Exclusive Powers to Direct Investment of Trust Funds, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.
